metadata.significance: Opens with oath by fig and olive, emphasizes human creation and righteousness

ayahs.arabic: بِّسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلتِّينِ وَٱلزَّيْتُونِ

translations.en_sahih: By the fig and the olive
translations.en_yusufali: By the Fig and the Olive,

ayahs.arabic: لَقَدْ خَلَقْنَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنَ فِىٓ أَحْسَنِ تَقْوِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Laqad khalaqna alinsana fee ahsani taqweemin

translations.en_sahih: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;
translations.en_yusufali: We have indeed created man in the best of moulds,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menciptakan manusia dalam bentuk yang sebaik-baiknya (dan berkelengkapan sesuai dengan keadaannya).

translations.en_sahih: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,
translations.en_yusufali: Then do We abase him (to be) the lowest of the low,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Kemudian (jika ia panjang umur sehingga tua atau menyalahgunakan kelengkapan itu), Kami kembalikan dia ke serendah-rendah peringkat orang-orang yang rendah,

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَعَمِلُوا۟ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ فَلَهُمْ أَجْرٌ غَيْرُ مَمْنُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoo waAAamiloo alssalihati falahum ajrun ghayru mamnoonin

translations.en_sahih: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.
translations.en_yusufali: Except such as believe and do righteous deeds: For they shall have a reward unfailing.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali orang-orang yang beriman dan beramal soleh, maka mereka beroleh pahala yang tidak putus-putus.

translations.en_sahih: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?
translations.en_yusufali: Then what can, after this, contradict thee, as to the judgment (to come)?
translations.ms_basmeih: (Jika demikian kekuasaanKu), maka apa pula yang menjadikan engkau seorang pendusta, (berkata tidak benar) mengenai hari pembalasan, sesudah (ternyata dalil-dalil yang membuktikan kekuasaanKu mengadakan hari pembalasan) itu?

translations.en_sahih: Is not Allah the most just of judges?
translations.en_yusufali: Is not Allah the wisest of judges?
translations.ms_basmeih: Bukankah Allah (yang demikian kekuasaanNya) seadil-adil Hakim?
